papers.title: Role-Based Task Distribution in YAWL
papers.title_ja: YAWLにおけるロールベースのタスク配分
papers.summary: What happens when workflow tasks are assigned to an entire role rather than a specific user?This video introduces the role-based distribution pattern as a resource allocation mechanism in YAWL. The tutorial explains how role-based distribution makes a task available to all users who belong to a specified role, instead of assigning it to a single predefined individual. Using a simple workflow example involving store clerks and managers, the video demonstrates how a task is offered to multiple users simultaneously and remains visible in their work lists until one user accepts it. Once the task is taken, it is automatically removed from the work lists of the remaining users. The behavior is illustrated through both an animated explanation and a live execution in the YAWL system. Viewers learn how role-based distribution supports flexible task allocation in environments where multiple users are equally qualified to perform a task. papers.summary: The rapid advancement of deep learning models for visual tasks has led to significant progress in many domains. However, a key challenge remains: ensuring that models can generalize effectively to unseen samples or novel classes, especially in real-world scenarios where training data-target pairs are often limited or unavailable, and test data may exhibit shifts in both data and targets. This thesis addresses the problem of shifts across data and targets, proposing novel methods to improve model generalization and transferability in complex settings. The thesis identifies the different shift scenarios for visual tasks and presents their problem forms. The research first relaxes the static target distribution assumption in Multi-Domain Generalization (mDG) tasks, introducing the General Multi-Domain Generalization (GMDG) objective to improve generalization under varying data shifts. A major risk during these procedures is vessel or organ wall perforation if the guidewire is pushed too hard or advanced inaccurately, creating serious safety concerns. To reduce these risks, soft magnetic microrobots have been developed to make intravascular navigation safer and more precise. However, most current systems use predefined microrobot shapes or provide limited tip control, reducing their adaptability in complex anatomical environments. papers.summary: This project tests a model of cooperation in which breaking an explicit cooperative promise (“defection”) carries a cognitive cost, and individuals anticipate and manage that cost when deciding how to act. Participants complete an online experiment (implemented in Gorilla and run on Prolific) that combines memory tasks with a one-shot trust game. The key manipulation is the size of a bonus for a second memory test offered later in the study ($1 vs $20). The central prediction is that a larger downstream bonus will reduce the rate of promise-breaking in the trust game. We will test our primary hypothesis with a preregistered logistic regression predicting Defection from Condition (low vs high bonus), supplemented by a two-proportion test and pre-specified robustness analyses that re-code Defection among promisors only and, descriptively, separate non-promisers from promise-keepers and defectors.
papers.summary_ja: 協力状況において、明示的な約束を破ることがもたらす認知的コストを個人がどのように予見し、それが意思決定に影響するかを実験的に検証。認知心理学と行動経済学の境界領域を探索している。
papers.novelty_reason: 認知的コストの予見と協力行動の関連性という視点は新しいが、既存の協力ゲーム理論の拡張に留まっている。

papers.title: Behavioral science to strengthen democracy
papers.title_ja: 民主主義強化のための行動科学
papers.summary: Democracy faces critical challenges, including declining trust, misinformation, political polarization, and the strain on election systems. Despite its importance, behavioral science has contributed relatively little to addressing these issues compared to fields like health and sustainability. This thesis seeks to fill that gap by exploring how behavioral science can strengthen democracy through practical, evidence-based interventions. Chapter one reviews the evidence and opportunities. Chapter two demonstrates how operational transparency, using video, print, and email interventions, increases voter trust and turnout, especially among those who have no party preference. Chapter three examines the role of trusted messengers and inoculation techniques, such as prebunking and accuracy nudges, in combating misinformation. Findings reveal that local, trusted figures, like election officials and pastors, effectively improve voter trust and truth discernment, particularly during active elect...
papers.summary_ja: 民主主義が直面する信頼低下、偽情報、政治的分極化といった危機的課題に対して、行動科学がいかに貢献できるかを検証。健康や持続可能性分野での応用に比べ遅れている民主主義領域への行動科学の適用を推進している。
papers.novelty_reason: 行動科学を民主主義の危機克服に体系的に適用する研究アプローチは、政治学と行動科学の新たな交差領域を開拓している。

papers.title: Depth of Processing, learner aptitude, and the acquisition of L2 English grammatical structures
papers.title_ja: 処理の深さ、学習者適性、および第二言語英文法構造の習得
papers.summary: Depth of Processing (DoP) is central to several models of instructed second language acquisition (ISLA) (Leow, 2015). While DoP has been extensively examined in vocabulary learning (e.g., Laufer & Hulstijn, 2001), its role in the acquisition of grammatical structures, particularly through oral and audio-visual modalities remains comparatively underexplored. Drawing on the Levels of Processing framework (Craik & Lockhart, 1972), this study investigated whether task-induced processing depth influences the acquisition of third conditionals and comparatives, and whether language aptitude (LLAMA B, D, F) predicts learning gains. Using a pretest–posttest design, four intact classes involving 108 Grade 8 EFL learners in India were assigned to one of the three experimental conditions differing in level and type of processing: Low DoP, High DoP Explicit, and High DoP Implicit. The treatment task required the participants to listen to an audio-visual story containing the target structure...

papers.summary: Exposure to natural environments has been shown to produce robust effects on attention-related functions (Berman et al., 2008; Stenfors et al., 2019; Stevenson et al., 2018; Bratman et al., 2015; Stevenson et al., 2018). Attention restoration theory (ART) proposes that stimuli in compatible environments engage individuals in involuntary attention, allowing more effortful top-down processes to replenish (Kaplan, 1995; Pham & Sanocki, 2024). However, ART research does not account for differences in compatibility, nor does it investigate other domains of cognition that may indirectly benefit from attention restoration, such as long-term memory. To address these gaps, we investigated how environmental exposure (either nature or urban) would affect mnemonic discrimination, and if environmental preference played a role in such effects. papers.summary_ja: 短時間のビデオを通じた自然環境への露出が、特に記憶機能に及ぼす影響を検証。注意回復理論をデジタルメディアの時代に適応させ、自然の認知的効果の新たなアクセス方法を提供している。

papers.summary: Treatment adherence (hereafter, adherence) is critical to achieving positive therapeutic outcomes, whereas non-adherence remains a major public health challenge that hinders recovery and increases healthcare expenditures. As social media has become a prominent channel for information consumption and sharing, social media influencers (SMIs) may play an important role in enhancing adherence. Yet the mechanisms through which engagement with SMIs promotes adherence are not well understood. Drawing on the source attractiveness model, this study posits that influencer characteristics – specifically social attractiveness and perceived credibility – shape evaluations of health messages and, in turn, persuade followers toward adherence. We examine the relationship between SMI social attractiveness and adherence, test the mediating roles of perceived authenticity and perceived expertise, and explore the moderating role of SMI message type. Using survey data from 475 participants, we find that SM...
papers.summary_ja: ソーシャルメディア・インフルエンサーが治療的コンプライアンス（服薬遵守など）の促進に果たす役割と、その公衆衛生政策への応用可能性を検証。デジタル時代の健康行動変容メカニズムを分析している。

papers.title: The nature and tensions of environmental management control in local authorities
papers.title_ja: 地方自治体における環境マネジメント統制の性質と緊張関係
papers.authors: Christophe Maurel, Christophe Favoreu, London Proofreaders
papers.summary: This exploratory research aims to characterize, on the one hand, the concept of environmental management control (EMC) through the practices that underpin it, and, on the other hand, the tensions associated with it and the implementation of these practices in public organizations. Although EMC is attracting growing interest within the public sector, it seems to be facing technical and governance difficulties. A grid for analyzing management tools and the theory of organizational paradoxes is used to address the issue of characterizing EMC practices and the associated tensions in the local public sector. Various municipalities were mobilized to explore and characterize their first experiences of implementing EMC. Our results enable us to characterize both the tools used and the tensions generated between the objectives pursued in terms of resource management, dialogue with the socio-economic environment, and behavioral orientation.
papers.summary_ja: 地方自治体による環境マネジメント統制（EMC）の実践的特性と、その実装に伴う緊張関係を分析した探索的研究。公共組織への環境マネジメント概念の適用における課題と可能性を検証している。

papers.summary: Street vending is a common practice in virtually all cities, particularly in the Global South, where it primarily operates informally and accounts for a higher proportion of economic activity compared to the Global North. Hence, in the Global South, public policy often views street vending as a form of disorder and has primarily sought to ban it due to its unregulated nature. Among the contemporary debates in planning literature is the type of spatial regulations for managing urban space, with scholars exploring the use of flexible land use instruments, developed based on qualitative principles applicable to all places and agents, as an alternative to conventional land use instruments, which are considered too rigid. This idea aligns with the growing understanding of self-organisation as a fundamental driving force behind urban transformation. This research aims to understand how different types of regulations interact with the selforganising behaviour of street vendors to produce bett...
papers.summary_ja: グローバル・サウスの都市経済において重要な役割を果たす露天商売について、インドネシアの事例から、公的規制がいかに非公式セクターの自己組織化を促進または阻害するかを検証。都市経済ガバナンスの新たなアプローチを提示している。
papers.novelty_reason: 規制と非公式経済の自己組織化の関係性に焦点を当てるアプローチは、都市経済学に新たな分析視点をもたらし、グローバル・サウスの経済実態への理解を深めている。

papers.title: The seminal proteome of a monandrous fly, Drosophila subobscura
papers.title_ja: 単一配偶制のハエ、Drosophila subobscuraの精液プロテオーム
papers.summary: When females mate with multiple males, ejaculates from different partners compete within the female reproductive tract. Males gain a competitive advantage by transferring seminal fluid proteins (Sfps) that manipulate female post-mating responses, such as reducing female propensity to remate. But in monandrous species, where females typically mate only once, post-mating sexual selection is absent, raising key questions about the complexity and identity of Sfps in monandrous seminal proteomes. To address this, we characterised the seminal proteome of the monandrous fly Drosophila subobscura. Using long-read RNA-seq, we created improved gene models for the D. subobscura accessory gland and ejaculatory duct, then, using a label-free quantitative proteomics approach, we identified 172 Sfps. This number is comparable to the 153 Sfps previously reported in polyandrous D. melanogaster using a similar approach. The D. subobscura seminal proteome contains all the D. melanogaster sex peptide netw...
papers.summary_ja: 複数のオスと交配するメスの場合、異なるオスの射精物は雌の生殖管内で競争する。オスは精液タンパク質（Sfps）を転送することで競争優位性を得て、メスの再交配傾向の低下などの交配後の反応を操作する。

papers.title: A Human Pan-Disease Whole Blood Transcriptomics Atlas Reveals Systemic Signatures Across Diseases
papers.title_ja: 人間汎疾患全血トランスクリプトミクスアトラス：疾患横断的なシステミックシグネチャーの解明
papers.summary: This dataset accompanies the manuscript titled “A Human Pan-Disease Whole Blood Transcriptomics Atlas Reveals Systemic Signatures Across Diseases” Whole-blood transcriptomics (WBT) provides critical insights into systemic health and disease. In this study, we established a large-scale WBT Atlas comprising 4,444 samples across 98 distinct health conditions. Through integrative analyses, we identified disease-specific gene expression signatures and developed a multi-omics classification framework capable of distinguishing among these conditions based on their unique transcriptomic profiles. The dataset includes RNA-seq data from 4,444 samples used for atlas construction, along with 10 cohorts utilized for machine learning–based external validation.
papers.summary_ja: 全血トランスクリプトミクスは全身の健康と疾患への重要な洞察を提供する。本研究は大規模なWBTアトラスを構築し、複数疾患にわたるシステミックな特性を明らかにした。

papers.summary: The mechanisms underlying the formation of species diversity have remained a subject of intense debate. In this study, we used Gryllidea (crickets) as a representative lineage and employed a phylogenetic comparative framework based on a robust phylogeny reconstructed from ultraconserved elements, mitochondrial genomes, nuclear ribosomal genes, DNA barcodes, and morphological traits. Most species within these rapidly diversifying clades are distributed in the Oriental and Sino-Japanese regions. papers.summary: Background: The underrepresentation of Hmong-Mien (HM) people in Asian genomic studies has hindered our comprehensive understanding of the full landscape of their evolutionary history and complex trait architecture. South China is a multi-ethnic region and indigenously settled by ethnolinguistically diverse HM, Austroasiatic (AA), Tai-Kadai (TK), Austronesian (AN) and Sino-Tibetan (ST) people, which is regarded as East Asia's initial cradle of biodiversity. However, previous fragmented genetic studies have only presented a fraction of the landscape of genetic diversity in this region, especially the lack of haplotype-based genomic resources. The deep characterization of demographic history and natural-selection-relevant genetic architecture of HM people was necessary. Results: We reported one HM-specific genomic resource and comprehensively explored the fine-scale genetic structure and adaptative features inferred from the genome-wide SNP data of 440 HM individuals from 33 ethnolinguis...

papers.title: Dynamic Mitochondrial Protein Succinylation Induced by Nutritional Intervention with Omega-3 Polyunsaturated Fatty Acids Elicits Growth Inhibition and Lethality in Prostate Cancer Cells
papers.title_ja: オメガ3多価不飽和脂肪酸による栄養介入で誘導される動的なミトコンドリアタンパク質スクシニル化：前立腺癌細胞における増殖阻害と致死性
papers.summary: Prostate cancer (PCa) continues to present a significant therapeutic challenge due to its metabolic plasticity and resistance to conventional treatments. Although omega-3 fatty acids, especially high-purity eicosapentaenoic acid (EPA), have demonstrated anticancer properties, the underlying molecular mechanisms remain inadequately understood. In this study, we provide evidence that EPA induces potent growth inhibition in PCa cells by modulating a mitochondrial succinylation network, thereby revealing three interconnected nodes of metabolic vulnerability. Through succinylomic profiling and functional validation, we identified SDHA, GOT2, and DAP3 as critical EPA-induced succinylation targets. Mechanistically, SDHA succinylation induces succinate accumulation and promotes widespread succinylation across mitochondrial proteins, thereby disrupting the homeostasis of mitochondria. This mitochondrial dysfunction converges on two lethal pathways in PCa cells: first, GOT2 hyper-succinylation i...
papers.summary_ja: 前立腺癌は代謝可塑性と従来治療への耐性により治療課題を呈する。オメガ3脂肪酸特にエイコサペンタエン酸（EPA）の抗癌特性が知られているが、基礎となる分子メカニズムは未解明である。
papers.novelty_reason: EPA誘導的なミトコンドリアタンパク質スクシニル化の詳細解析は、既知の栄養介入効果の新しい分子基盤を明らかにする。

papers.summary: The Hippo pathway is evolutionarily conserved to regulate multiple biological processes including development, organ size, apoptosis, and tissue regeneration, thereby maintaining tissue homeostasis. This tumour-suppressive signalling cascade acts inactivates the downstream effectors and oncogenes YAP/TAZ, preventing their binding to the TEAD transcription factors. Disruption of the Hippo pathway and aberrant YAP/TAZ activity are observed in many cancers such as pleural mesothelioma (PM) and head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC), where there are known genetic drivers. Deubiquitinating enzymes (DUBs) have been identified as direct or indirect regulators of the pathway. However, questions remain unresolved, notably around the specificity of their interaction with the Hippo components which may depend on the cancer type and/or genetic background. To uncover novel roles for DUBs in malignancies with YAP/TAZ aberrant activation, the regulation of these oncogenes in PM and HNSCC was i...

papers.summary: Chromatin organisation influences gene regulation and genome stability, yet its dysregulation in cancer remains incompletely understood. This has become particularly important for patient diagnostics using cell-free DNA (cfDNA) from body fluids, based on computational analyses of nucleosome occupancy landscapes reconstructed from cfDNA. This thesis establishes the first comprehensive atlas of nucleosome positioning signatures across repetitive elements in tumour tissues and cfDNA. Using original approaches to cfDNA analysis, I demonstrate that genomic repetitive elements, including satellite repeats, LINEs, SINEs, and LTRs, undergo reproducible family-, subfamily-, and tissue-specific nucleosome repositioning in cancer. Integration with DNA methylation profiling reveals coordinated changes in methylation and nucleosome positioning at specific genomic repeats, underscoring the epigenetic interplay that drives chromatin instability. Quantifying cfDNA profiles at DNA sequence repeats, inc...

papers.title: Agta hunter-gatherer oral microbiomes are shaped by contact network structure
papers.title_ja: Agta狩猟採集民の口腔マイクロバイオームは接触ネットワーク構造により形成される
papers.authors: Federico Musciotto, Begoña Dobón, Michael Greenacre, Álex Mira, Nikhil Chaudhary, Guz Deniz Salali, Pascale Gerbault, Rodoplh Schlaepfer, Leonora H. Astete, Marilyn Ngales
papers.summary: Here we investigate the effects of extensive sociality and mobility on the oral microbiome of 138 Agta hunter-gatherers from the Philippines. Our comparisons of microbiome composition showed that the Agta are more similar to Central African Bayaka hunter-gatherers than to neighbouring farmers. We also defined the Agta social microbiome as a set of 137 oral bacteria (only 7% of 1980 amplicon sequence variants) significantly influenced by social contact (quantified through wireless sensors of short-range interactions). We show that large interaction networks including strong links between close kin, spouses, and even unrelated friends, can significantly predict bacterial transmission networks across Agta camps. Finally, we show that more central individuals to social networks are also bacterial supersharers. We conclude that hunter-gatherer social microbiomes are predominantly pathogenic and were shaped by evolutionary tradeoffs between extensive sociality and disease spread.
papers.summary_ja: フィリピンの138人のAgta狩猟採集民の広範な社会性と移動性が口腔マイクロバイオームに与える影響を調査した。Agtaのマイクロバイオーム組成は中央アフリカのBayaka狩猟採集民により類似していることが示唆された。
papers.novelty_reason: 人間社会ネットワーク構造がマイクロバイオーム形成を直接規定するメカニズムを示すことで、微生物生態学と社会人類学の融合新領域を開拓している。

papers.summary: PDAC forms a dense, T-cell-excluded tumor microenvironment, but the molecular drivers of this niche remain unclear. Using Perturb-map, a spatial functional genomics platform, we identify the fibrinolysis regulators Serpinb2 (PAI-2) and Serpine1 (PAI-1) as key mediators of immune evasion. Tumor-derived SERPINs stabilize a fibrin-rich ECM that anchors macrophages, promotes immunosuppressive polarization, and excludes cytotoxic T cells. Their deletion suppresses tumor growth and sensitizes PDAC to anti-PD-1 therapy.
papers.summary_ja: 膵管癌（PDAC）は密集したT細胞排除腫瘍微小環境を形成するが、このニッチの分子駆動因子は不明である。空間機能ゲノミクスプラットフォームPerturb-mapを使用して、線維素溶解レギュレーターSerpinb2（PAI-2）とSerpine1（PAI-1）が免疫回避の主要仲介者であることを同定した。

papers.title: Labour mobility in Europe: Using Planned Behaviour Theory to understand migration intentions and location choice of the highly skilled
papers.title_ja: ヨーロッパにおける労働移動：計画的行動理論を用いた高度人材の移住意思と地域選択の理解
papers.summary: Highly skilled migration is a complex phenomenon which despite its comparatively small volume continues to receive interest from a variety of disciplines, all seeking to understand what drives individuals to migrate, and where to. Migration in general has historically been assessed through an economic lens, assuming financial incentives as the key motivation, and treating the migrant as a rational actor who carefully considers their options before making a rational decision about location and time of migration. This approach, however, proves unsatisfactory because it fails to consider non-financial drivers, the individual’s social environment, and the presence of perceived challenges which all influence the decision-making process. This study applies an expanded Planned Behaviour Theory model to understand how highly skilled young Europeans form their intention to migrate, which locations they choose, and what factors influence their decision-making process before migration takes place...
papers.summary_ja: 高度人材の移住現象を計画的行動理論の枠組みから分析する。経済学的アプローチを超えて、個人の心理的・社会的要因が移住決定と地域選択に与える影響を検討している。

papers.summary: This thesis introduces the inferential actor model to International Relations to address the persistent puzzle of why leaders make sub-optimal foreign policy choices. Drawing on the neuroscience theory of active inference, it reframes decision-making as a dynamic process in which uncertainty is not simply a problem of missing information but an actor-managed variable with direct implications for the decision process. The model’s validity is tested through an extended case study of Lyndon Johnson’s Vietnam strategy (1964-65), comparing its expectations with those of two stylized alternatives: a realist model rooted in rationalist assumptions and a domestic politics model. Based on extensive archival research, the thesis finds that gradual escalation was less the product of firm conviction than a costly exercise in hypothesis testing. Johnson relied on predictions about the consequences of losing South Vietnam to sustain escalation despite low confidence in his policy options. His combin...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、神経科学の能動的推論理論を国際関係論に導入し、国家指導者がなぜ最適でない外交政策を選択するのかという謎を解明する。不確実性下での意思決定プロセスを動的過程として再構成している。
papers.novelty_reason: 神経科学的理論を国際政治に初めて体系的に適用する試みで、IR分析における新たなメタ理論的基礎を提供している。

papers.summary: This book addresses the metaphysical question of the first principles as articulated by Damascius (458/462-538) in his Problems and Solutions Concerning the First Principles (De Principiis). Damascius’ treatise is a major philosophical work of Antiquity, offering a radical and profound enquiry into principles. The present book stresses the philosophical and historical relevance of Damascius’ work with regard to this metaphysical issue and provides a detailed analysis of the De Principiis. This study is based on the hypothesis that the aporetic opening of Damascius’ treatise and his treatment of the concept of an absolute and completely ineffable principle are the first step toward an enquiry about the first principles which can be called “principles,” namely the One and its threefold manifestation as One-All, All-One, and One-Being. Recent studies have stressed Damascius’ aporetic method and the radical nature of his view regarding the concept of an absolute principle. However, little ...
papers.summary_ja: 古代ギリシャ哲学者ダマスキウス（458/462-538）の『初原理に関する問題と解答』を詳細に読解し、存在論的基礎としての第一原理の形而上学的問題を検討する。プロティノス以降のネオプラトニズムの深化を示す重要な著作の再解釈である。
papers.novelty_reason: 古代哲学の標準的な研究方法による詳細な読解であり、既存の古代哲学研究の枠組み内での深化である。

papers.title: The Malthusian Trap: A Modern Framework for Population Growth and Climate-Induced Resource Scarcity
papers.title_ja: マルサスの罠：人口増加と気候誘発資源不足のための現代的枠組み
papers.summary: Version 5 represents a conceptual consolidation and structural refinement of the analytical framework developed in earlier versions of this study. papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、オカルティズムと前衛芸術の結合というテーマが周辺的な議論から中心的なメタナラティブへと移行する現象を分析している。特にカンディンスキーの無政府主義的オカルティズムと神秘主義が急進的政治運動に与えた影響を検証する。
papers.novelty_reason: 20世紀前衛美術とオカルティズム・神秘主義の関係を、錬金術と菌類学的視点から統合的に再評価し、美術史の新たな解釈枠組みを提示している。

papers.title: Turkish Folk Instruments and Voices in Contemporary Music
papers.title_ja: 現代音楽におけるトルコ民族楽器と声
papers.authors: Michael P Ellison, Nihat Argun Cakir, Robert Reigle
papers.summary: Turkish Folk Instruments and Voices in Contemporary Music (TFIVCM) is the first instrumentation resource which covers in depth the folk instruments and voices of Türkiye and Anatolia and their inclusion in contemporary music. It is the second book on the topic of makam instruments in the Routledge Transcultural Music Practices series, the first having concentrated on those of classical makam. Practical, basic information about construction, range, tuning, positions, transposition, character, and playing techniques of folk instruments and voices are provided in written form, along with traditional and contemporary repertoire examples. Crucial to demonstrating the book’s contents are multi-camera-angle video recordings of master Turkish folk instrumentalists filmed in the MIAM recording studio in Istanbul, with captions labelling specific techniques, and in some instances overlaid subtitles (in English).
papers.summary_ja: 本書は、トルコおよびアナトリアの民族楽器と声、ならびに現代音楽への包含を深く扱う初の楽器法リソースである。マカーム楽器に関するルートレッジ社出版シリーズの第二巻である。
papers.novelty_reason: トルコ民族音楽と現代音楽の融合を包括的に記述した参考資料的価値があるが、理論的新規性は限定的である。

papers.title: MISLEADING GAZE: IMAGE AND DESIRE IN THE ROVER
papers.title_ja: 誤った視線：『ローヴァー』における画像と欲望
papers.summary: This paper explores Aphra Behn’s The Rover (1677) as a complex interrogation of gender roles, libertinism, and the commodification of female sexuality in Restoration comedy. Drawing from Thomas Killigrew’s Thomaso, the Wanderer (1664), Behn both inherits and subverts the conventions of the genre, particularly through her treatment of masquerade, gaze, and social identity. Focusing on the figures of Angellica Bianca, Hellena, and Florinda, the study analyses how female characters navigate patriarchal constraints, erotic desire, and the unstable dichotomy between virgin and whore. It also examines Behn’s critique of violent male libertinism, exemplified by the character of Willmore, and her strategic use of theatrical devices such as costuming and misrecognition. The carnival setting, with its temporary suspension of societal norms, serves as a crucial backdrop for exploring the fluidity of gendered performance. Ultimately, the paper argues that The Rover challenges contemporary sexual i...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、アプラ・ベーンの『ローヴァー』（1677年）を、復古時代喜劇における性別役割、奔放主義、女性の性の商品化に関する複雑な質問として分析する。トマス・キリグルーの『トマーソ』（1664年）から継承しつつ、ジャンルの慣例を覆す。
papers.novelty_reason: 17世紀演劇における女性の主体性と性の商品化の関係を、視覚と欲望の相互作用という新たな美学的枠組みから解釈している。

papers.title: Toward an Epistemic Aesthetics of Sound:A Response to Tomas Percival’s Countering Risks: John, David, Edward
papers.title_ja: 音の認識論的美学へ向けて：トマス・パーシヴァルの『リスクに対抗する』への応答
papers.summary: [Toward an Epistemic Aesthetics of Sound:A Response to Tomas Percival’s Countering Risks: John, David, Edward]
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、音響経験の認識論的側面に焦点を当て、トマス・パーシヴァルの先行研究に対する理論的応答を示している。
papers.novelty_reason: 音響美学に認識論的視点を導入し、既存の音響理論の枠組みを理論的に拡張している。

papers.title: Piano music of the Black Renaissance
papers.title_ja: 黒人ルネサンスのピアノ音楽
papers.summary: This ground breaking anthology introduces a canon of piano works from the Black Renaissance school of the early twentieth century. The music of Harry T. Burleigh, Samuel Coleridge-Taylor, R. Nathaniel Dett, Nora Holt, Florence B. Price, Zenobia Powell Perry, Margaret Bonds, and Betty Jackson King affirms a rich, Afrodiasporic concert tradition, in which African, Caribbean, and African American folk songs and dances are absorbed into a distinct classical voice. This volume offers clearly presented performing editions, with fingering and pedalling, of a representative selection of piano music from this period, ranging from intermediate to advanced levels. Notes by Dr Samantha Ege provide historical background and interpretative insights for this previously overlooked area of piano literature.
papers.summary_ja: 本画期的アンソロジーは、20世紀初頭の黒人ルネサンス楽派からのピアノ作品のカノンを紹介する。ハリー・T・バーレイ、サミュエル・コールリッジ=テイラーら8人の作曲家の作品を収録している。
papers.novelty_reason: 黒人作曲家による20世紀初頭のピアノ音楽を体系的にカノン化し、クラシック音楽史における周辺化された重要な伝統を再発見・再評価する試みである。

papers.novelty_reason: 演劇史の既知の時期を扱っているが、パフォーマンス史的視点から再構成する試みは一定の新規性を持つ。

papers.title: Affective enactment in narrative space : readers' encounters with contemporary British urban fiction
papers.title_ja: ナラティブ空間における感情的遂行：現代英国都市フィクションの読者経験

papers.novelty_reason: 文学批評に感情的遂行と空間的経験の概念を統合し、読者反応理論に新たな次元を加えている。

papers.title: Psychogeography in the twenty-first century : embodiment and the city
papers.title_ja: 21世紀の心理地理学：身体性と都市
papers.summary: Psychogeography in the Twenty-First Century: Embodiment and the City offers an updated and comprehensive study of urban practice through the intersections of urbanity, sociology, politics, aesthetics, and the sciences. Building on foundational texts such as Merlin Coverley’s work, this study highlights contemporary methodologies that reflect the diverse backgrounds and embodied experiences of psychogeographers in urban environments. Its examination of recent works of key figures, including Laura Oldfield Ford, Nicola White Mudlark, Priti Pandurangan, and McKenzie Wark, emphasizes their intentional use of digital technologies, online platforms and exhibitions to share détourné artifacts (e.g., writings, photographs, drawings, and maps, as demonstrated at the Fourth World Congress of Psychogeography) as counter-narratives to institutionalized portrayals of the city. In doing so, Psychogeography in the Twenty-First Century also underscores the significance of multimodality and transmedial...
papers.summary_ja: 本著作は、都市性、社会学、政治学、美学、諸科学の交差点を通じた都市実践の包括的かつ更新された研究を提供する。メルリン・カヴァリーらの基礎的テキストに基づきながら、本研究は新たな視点を強調する。
papers.novelty_reason: 心理地理学を21世紀的文脈で更新し、身体性と都市経験の相互関係を多領域的に統合した新しい分析枠組みを提示している。

papers.title: Picture This: A new sociocultural ‘layered listening framework’ that promotes participation through documentary photography, with young children whose families have migrated to the UK.
papers.title_ja: 写真に注目：ドキュメンタリー写真を通じた参加を促進する新しい社会文化的『段階的リスニング枠組み』、英国に移民家族がいる幼い児童向け
papers.summary: High quality, equitable early childhood education and care (ECEC) is significant for the participation of children whose families have migrated to the UK. The rich lived experiences, perspectives and funds of knowledge of newly arrived children are largely invisible and there is an increased risk of social exclusion as a consequence. Drawing upon the findings of a three-year study using child-led photography and photo story books to explore three- to four-year-old children’s funds of knowledge, this chapter offers an original theoretical and pedagogic ‘layered listening framework’ (LLF) that blurs sociocultural theory and visual theories for deep listening with young children. This novel conceptualisation, comprising intuitive and wise photography; ambiguity; photographing democratically and ‘elastic spaces’ suggests an expanded guide for understanding how children as ‘photographer-authors’ co-create diverse perspectives about their lived experiences as pedagogical possibilities. Furth...
papers.summary_ja: 質の高く公平な幼児教育保育（ECEC）は、英国に移民した家族の児童の参加にとって重要である。新たに到着した児童の豊かな生活経験、視点、知識資源は大多数が不可視化されており、参加リスクが増加している。
papers.novelty_reason: ドキュメンタリー写真と段階的リスニング枠組みを組み合わせ、移民児童の包括的参加を実現する新しい教育実践方法を開発している。

papers.title: Mnemonic Conviviality in ‘Post-Cold War’ Britain:Entangled Memories in Urban Space
papers.title_ja: 『ポスト冷戦』ブリテンにおける記憶的親善：都市空間における纏綿する記憶
papers.summary: This article asks how sharing everyday memories in Britain’s superdiverse urban spaces can foster understanding across difference. Drawing on narratives and images produced in 39 arts based photography workshops in West Bromwich and Hyson Green, it develops the concept of mnemonic conviviality: a mode of “living with difference” grounded in the exchange of personal, familial, and collective memories. Through a multi sited, multi group methodology – combining photovoice, visual analysis, and ethnographic dialogue – the article demonstrates how ordinary objects, places, and images spark conversations that entangle memories of socialism, post socialism, colonialism and migration. Through these micro narratives, participants forge temporary commonalities while revealing the enduring impact of the Cold War, colonial hierarchies, and racialisation on contemporary British life. The article demonstrates how memory studies can deepen understandings of conviviality in hyperlocal superdiverse spa...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、ブリテンの高度多様化した都市空間における日常的な記憶の共有がいかに差異を超えた理解を醸成しうるかを問う。西ブロムウィッチとハイソン・グリーンで行われた39の芸術的写真ワークショップから生成されたナラティブと画像を用いて、本研究は記憶的親善という概念を展開する。
papers.novelty_reason: 共有された日常的記憶を通じた都市的親善という概念を新たに提唱し、多民族共生のための新しい社会的想像力を提示している。
papers.source_name: University of Birmingham Research Portal (University of Birmingham)

papers.title: Fashion on the Frontier: Photography, Time and Colonial Modernity on the Madeira-Mamoré Railroad, Brazil
papers.title_ja: 辺境のファッション：ブラジル・マデイラ・マモレ鉄道における写真、時間、植民地近代性
papers.summary: Fashion on the Frontier: Photography, Time and Colonial Modernity on the Madeira-Mamoré Railroad, Brazil (2026) examines the relationship between fashion, photography and the temporal regimes of colonial modernity in the Brazilian Amazon. It explores how land was demarcated with the expansion of the North American frontier in South America, but also how the contours of different ethnic and racialised bodies were delineated and articulated through fashion and via the pseudo-scientific medium of photography. It moves across diverse fields of thought to consider histories and theories of photography and fashion, modernity and coloniality, labour and domesticity, gender and whiteness, whilst deploying innovative and pertinent historical methodologies for thinking about archival hegemonies and silences. By interrogating History as a critical practice in the fashioning of Latin America, her research questions the emphases and erasures that haunt Brazilian fashion histories.
papers.summary_ja: 本著作は、ブラジルアマゾンにおけるマデイラ・マモレ鉄道沿線での植民地近代性の時間体制におけるファッション、写真、その関係性を検証する。土地測量の拡大に伴う領域画定のプロセスと、ファッションの視覚的表現との関連を探索する。
papers.novelty_reason: ファッション・写真・植民地近代性という従来は別領域で扱われてきた要素を、アマゾン地域の具体的歴史文脈で統合的に分析している。

papers.title: Curating Hinterland:Reassembling Invisible Work in Art / Science Practices
papers.title_ja: 内陸部のキュレーション：アート/サイエンス実践における不可視労働の再編成

papers.title: Jacques Lecoq’s Embodied and Ecological Actor Training
papers.title_ja: ジャック・ルコックの身体的かつ生態学的な俳優訓練法
papers.authors: Evans, Mark; id_orcid 0000-0003-0564-0771, Pearce, Michael, Kenney, Denise
papers.summary: This chapter argues that Jacques Lecoq’s pedagogy, which nurtures creative expression through embodied identification with the more-than-human world and operates through non-hierarchical group creation, can be understood as a form of ecological enquiry, one that functions less as a fixed technique and more as an epistemology: a living methodology.  Jacques Lecoq founded his school in Paris in 1956. Over the last seventy years, it has trained over 5,000 graduates from more than 80 countries, many of whom have gone on to teach and adapt his approach across the globe. Lecoq’s pedagogy offers students a distinctive journey of creative self-discovery. Unlike mainstream theatre programmes that centre on human psychological and social relations, Lecoq’s approach is predicated on the maxim tout bouge (‘everything moves’), a philosophy that invites students to experience their human selves as an integral part of a field of lively and vibrant organic and inorganic materials, rhythms, colours, sp...
papers.summary_ja: 本章は、非人間的世界との身体的同一化を通じた創造的表現を育むジャック・ルコックの教育学が、固定的な技法としてではなく生態学的探究の一形態として理解できることを主張する。非階層的集団創造を通じて機能する。
papers.novelty_reason: 俳優訓練を生態学的探究として再概念化し、人間と非人間の関係性における身体実践の新たな意義を開示している。

papers.title: ‘It Smelt Real’:Jorvik Viking Centre and the Experience of Museum Smellscapes
papers.title_ja: 『それは本物の臭いがした』：ヨーヴィク・ヴァイキング・センターと博物館の嗅覚景観の経験
papers.summary: Despite the emergence of sensory history and the increasing use of smell at museums and heritage sites, little attention has been paid to how smell experiences and public perceptions of the past mutually shape each other. Using newspapers, user-generated reviews, participant observation, and surveys, this article provides an analysis of smell’s use and reception at Jorvik Viking Centre, one of the first UK museums to use artificial ambient scents, from its opening in 1984 to the present. Both distributions of the sensible and longer histories of smell media have shaped the way academics, museums professionals, and visitors have responded to Jorvik’s smells. In contrast to existing work that has dismissed the use of smell in museums and heritage spaces as a curatorial trick that contrasts a foul-smelling past with contemporary odorlessness, this article argues that Jorvik’s scents offer an example of a ‘key smell’ that allows for the exploration of multiple overlapping experiences of th...
papers.summary_ja: 感覚的歴史と博物館・遺産サイトにおける嗅覚利用の増加にもかかわらず、嗅覚経験と過去に関する公衆認識がいかに相互に形作られるかについて、ほとんど注意が払われていない。新聞、利用者生成レビュー、参与観察、調査を用いて分析する。
papers.novelty_reason: 博物館における嗅覚体験という感覚的次元を、歴史理解と公衆認識の相互構成に関わる重要な研究対象として新たに位置づけている。

papers.title: Designing Serious Games on Contemporary Music: A Case Study on Poème Électronique
papers.title_ja: 現代音楽に関するシリアスゲームのデザイン：『ポエム・エレクトロニック』のケーススタディ
papers.authors: Vittorio Murtas, Juan-David Rodas, Vincenzo Lombardo
papers.summary: The communication of intangible heritage, especially for the contemporary repertoire, is a hard challenge. Interactive narratives can address this challenge by integrating the stories told by media scholars with physical and virtual engagement devices that display stylistic, cultural, and performative dimensions. In this context, contemporary music is particularly challenging, because of its opening to non-traditional sound timbres, spatial arrangement of the performance, and multimodality of experience.This paper introduces the mixed-reality serious game Edgar à GoGo, designed to foster post-listening engagement and enable players to explore both the sound components and their sequencing within an electroacoustic piece. The piece is a paradigmatic composition of Edgard Varèse, the Poème Électronique (1958), a landmark of electroacoustic music originally conceived for the Philips Pavilion at the Brussels World's Fair. This piece was a component of the multimedia show conceived by Le Co...
papers.summary_ja: 特に現代音楽レパートリーに関する無形文化遺産の伝達は困難な課題である。インタラクティブ・ナラティブは、メディア学者による語られた物語を物理的および仮想的なエンゲージメント装置と統合し、文体的・文化的・パフォーマンス的側面を提示することでこの課題に対処できる。
papers.novelty_reason: シリアスゲーム設計と現代音楽教育を融合させ、無形文化遺産の伝達のための新しいインタラクティブ方法論を提案している。
